message:
chore(gitignore): Exclude ephemeral cass/beads tracking files

Add exclusions for files that should not be committed to main:

- .cass/outcomes.jsonl: Local session outcome tracking that is
  ephemeral and regenerated each session. Contains transient
  feedback data that doesn't need version control.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: Managed by the beads sync mechanism which
  uses a separate beads-sync branch for synchronization. This file
  is updated frequently during development and synced via `bd sync`
  rather than direct commits to main.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,8 +53,12 @@ bun.lockb
 
 # CASS memory system (local/ephemeral)
 .cass/config.yaml
+.cass/outcomes.jsonl
 diary/*.md
 usage.jsonl
+
+# Beads (synced via beads-sync branch, not main)
+.beads/issues.jsonl
 # macOS
 .DS_Store
